title: Charlie The Steak
description: Changes Beef to Charlie The Steak!
body:
### The Texture Pack changes Beef to the main character of the old mobile game 'Charlie The Steak'.
# 
You can rename Totem of Undying to _**Steak of Undying**_. Also, if you rename Beef to _**Girl steak**_, then your Charlie will have a new girlfriend. But these features will require an Optifine.

![They want to play](https://i.imgur.com/oZAko0q.png)
